scenes.voice_text: GluMira is a clinical-grade glucose pattern intelligence platform. It gives you IOB-aware patient summaries, anomaly detection, and exportable structured reports — without replacing your workflow.
scenes.visual_note: Clean, clinical dashboard. Patient list on left. Summary panel on right. No decorative elements.

scenes.voice_text: IOB Hunter applies pharmacokinetic decay modelling per insulin type to calculate real-time insulin-on-board. It flags stacking risk, predicts nadir timing, and overlays dose events on the glucose timeline.
scenes.subtitle_text: PK-modelled IOB. Stacking risk. Nadir prediction.
scenes.visual_note: IOB curve with pharmacokinetic parameters visible. Clinical labelling. Stacking risk zone highlighted.

scenes.voice_text: The pattern engine performs statistical analysis across 7, 14, and 30-day windows — identifying recurring hypoglycaemia clusters, nocturnal spikes, post-prandial excursions, and basal drift. All flags are exportable.
scenes.subtitle_text: Statistical pattern detection across rolling windows.
scenes.visual_note: Clinical AGP-style layout. Flagged anomalies annotated. Export button visible.

scenes.voice_text: Patient profiles include diabetes type, comorbidity flags, medication records, dietary regime, and regional parameters. All data is structured for clinical review — not just personal tracking.
scenes.subtitle_text: Structured clinical profiles. Comorbidities. Medication. Regime.
scenes.visual_note: Patient profile in clinical view — all fields visible, structured layout, no consumer-facing styling

scenes.voice_text: Reports are AGP-compatible and include TIR, GMI, coefficient of variation, hypoglycaemia exposure, and a full IOB event log. Available as PDF or shareable link — configurable date range.
scenes.subtitle_text: AGP-compatible reports. TIR. GMI. CV. IOB event log.
scenes.visual_note: Report preview with AGP-style layout. All clinical metrics visible. PDF export button.

scenes.voice_text: View a sample patient summary now — or proceed directly to the dashboard. All features are available immediately.
scenes.subtitle_text: View a sample patient — or go straight to the dashboard.
scenes.visual_note: Two clear CTA buttons. Clinical, minimal. No decorative elements.
